  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 398 criminalizes the offer of a chance to win a lottery or similar prize-drawing contest to register to vote in California.",
    "The Senate Elections and Constructional Amendments Committee approved Senate Bill 398 by a unanimous and bipartisan vote of 5-0.",
    "During the 2024 U.S. Presidential Election, Elon Musk founded 'America PAC' to support Donald Trump.",
    "America PAC announced a $1 million lottery giveaway to individuals in swing states who signed a petition related to the First and Second Amendments of the U.S. Constitution.",
    "Vote buying is illegal federally and in every state in the United States.",
